IF DEFT DE- FAULTS BY MORE THAN TEN DAYS, THEN A JUDGMENT FOR FULL BAL- ANCE WITH INTEREST AT 10% ANNUM WILL BE ENTERED. BOTH DEFTS WAIVE CCP PROVISIONS REGARDING NEGATIVE DISMISSAL FOR FAIL- URE TO PROSECUTE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE SENT TO TRINITY CAP- ITAL. THERE WILL BE A STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ONLY IF THERE IS A DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS. PLTF TO PREPARE STIPULATION.
